mapper.select: SELECT id, command_type_id, parameter1, parameter2, parameter3 FROM serverdb.command WHERE date_processed IS NULL
mapper.update: UPDATE serverdb.command SET date_processed = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT command_type_id, parameter1, parameter2, parameter3 FROM serverdb.command WHERE parameter3 = #{parameter3} AND date_processed IS NULL
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO serverdb.command (command_type_id, parameter1, parameter2, parameter3, date_processed) VALUES (#{commandTypeId}, #{parameter1}, #{parameter2}, #{parameter3}, NULL)
